name: main
desc: entry · wires handlers · seeds sys.* · starts monitor, version, auth, sandbox-bridge

→.name: <init>
→.flow: #mId.text=meLabel ⊕ wire(#jBtn,#cIn,#sBtn,#scBtn) ⊕ SYS.write(startedAt,myId,myNm,myEm,trackerCount,userAgent) ⊕ startMonitor ⊕ startSandboxBridge ⊕ updPeers ⊕ startVersion ⊕ startAuth ⊕ onProfileChange(→re-hi) ⊕ setTimeout(join,300)
